neighbourhood.title: The Neighbourhood
paragraphs: Waterside Residences sits inside Krisumi City, a 30.38-acre Indo-Japanese master township in Sector 36A, Village Sihi, Gurugram, Haryana. The plot opens onto the Northern Peripheral Road, the alignment marketed locally as the Dwarka Expressway, with the Central Peripheral Road also within minutes of the site. Pataudi Road is at 1.6 km, giving the location two of the widest road frontages in southwest Gurugram.

The Sector 36A address places Waterside between the established commercial belts of Cyber City (17 km), MG Road (14.6 km) and IFFCO Chowk (13.6 km), and the green-zone planning corridor along the Dwarka Expressway, which is mapped for sustained low-density character. Indira Gandhi International Airport is at 24.8 km, a 35 minute drive on the expressway. Healthcare access is supported by Medanta and Fortis hospitals, both within 10 km.

Within the 30.38-acre Krisumi City masterplan, residents share landscape and green areas, water features and seating zones woven through the site. The Waterside Residences phase covers 5.0951 acres and houses Tower 3.1, Tower 3.2 and Tower 3.3, advancing through ground floor slab work as of April 2026.

builder.name: Krisumi Corporation Pvt. Ltd.
builder.description: Krisumi Corporation Pvt. Ltd. (CIN U70200HR2012PTC064545, PAN AAECV0565A) is a joint venture between India's Krishna Group and Japan's Sumitomo Corporation, bringing Japanese design discipline and after-sales rigor to the Indian residential market. Krisumi City, the firm's flagship 30.38-acre licensed master township in Sector 36A, Village Sihi, Gurugram, comprises Waterside Residences and other Krisumi phases. Waterside Residences engages Nikken Housing System (Japan) for exterior architecture and Aoyama Nomura Design, also written as a.N.D., for interiors. Promoter authorised signatory is Sh. Akash Khurana. The project banker is Sumitomo Mitsui Banking Corporation at Worldmark3, Aerocity, New Delhi.

investmentThesis.headline: Project standing and construction progress
paragraphs: Krisumi Waterside Residences is a phase of the 30.38-acre Krisumi City master township in Sector 36A Gurgaon, registered with HARERA as Krisumi Waterside Residences (RC/REP/HARERA/GGM/812/544/2024/39). The current registered phase covers 5.10 acres with 3 towers (3.1, 3.2, 3.3) housing 612 residential apartments, 108 EWS units and 1 shop. Designed by Nikken Housing System (Japan) for exteriors and Aoyama Nomura Design (a.N.D.) for interiors. Project completion date as declared by the promoter is 14 October 2029, subject to extension by HARERA in accordance with the Act and rules.

Construction across Towers 3.1, 3.2 and 3.3 is well into the structural phase as of 6 April 2026. All three towers have completed Excavation, Foundation, Basement 2 Slab and Basement 1 Slab works at 100 percent. Ground Floor Slab work is in active progress, recorded at 80 percent for Tower 3.1, 85 percent for Tower 3.2 and 65 percent for Tower 3.3. Pricing is published from 4.35 Cr for the 2 LDK configuration through 6.75 Cr for the 3 LDK with servant quarters. RERA-mandated sales are on a carpet area basis only. The phase carries a registered FAR of 90,684.63 sqm.

faqs.question: Where is Waterside Residences located?
faqs.answer: Waterside Residences is located in Sector 36A, Village Sihi, Gurugram, Haryana, inside the 30.38-acre Krisumi City master township. The plot opens onto the Northern Peripheral Road, marketed as the Dwarka Expressway. Indira Gandhi International Airport is at 24.8 km, Cyber City at 17 km, MG Road at 14.6 km, and Medanta Hospital at 9.6 km.

faqs.question: Who is the developer?
faqs.answer: Waterside Residences is developed by Krisumi Corporation Pvt. Ltd. (CIN U70200HR2012PTC064545), the joint venture between India's Krishna Group and Japan's Sumitomo Corporation. The architect partners for Waterside are Nikken Housing System (Japan) for exteriors and Aoyama Nomura Design (a.N.D.) for interiors. Source: krisumi.com Waterside Residences page and HARERA registration certificate.

faqs.question: What configurations are available?
faqs.answer: Waterside Residences offers 2 LDK, 2 LDK with servant (2 LDK + S), 3 LDK, and 3 LDK with servant (3 LDK + S). Tower 1 features a 3 LDK with servant layout, with carpet area of 1485 sqft and saleable area of 2700 sqft. Towers 2 and 3 feature additional layouts including a Penthouse A Lower Floor with carpet area 3110 sqft and saleable area 5867 sqft. The registered phase houses 612 residential apartments, 108 EWS units and 1 shop.

faqs.question: What is the starting price?
faqs.answer: The published starting price is 4.35 Cr for the 2 LDK configuration. The 3 LDK with servant is priced from 6.75 Cr. The full price list is: 2 LDK at 4.35 Cr, 2 LDK + S at 4.82 Cr, 2 LDK + S variant at 4.91 Cr, 3 LDK at 5.65 Cr, and 3 LDK + S at 6.75 Cr. Source: krisumi.com Project Price List. Per RERA, sales are on a carpet area basis only.

faqs.question: What is the construction status?
faqs.answer: As of 6 April 2026, Towers 3.1, 3.2 and 3.3 have all completed Excavation, Foundation, Basement 2 Slab and Basement 1 Slab works at 100 percent. Ground Floor Slab work is in progress: Tower 3.1 at 80 percent, Tower 3.2 at 85 percent, and Tower 3.3 at 65 percent. Source: krisumi.com construction update.

faqs.question: Who designed Waterside Residences?
faqs.answer: Exteriors are designed by Nikken Housing System, one of Japan's leading housing architecture firms. Interiors are designed by Aoyama Nomura Design, also known as a.N.D., a Tokyo-based interior architecture practice. The project is built within Krisumi Corporation's Indo-Japanese design sensibility.

faqs.question: Is the project RERA registered?
faqs.answer: Yes. Waterside Residences is registered with HARERA Gurugram under registration RC/REP/HARERA/GGM/812/544/2024/39 dated 8 April 2024, with project completion declared as 14 October 2029. The registered phase covers 5.0951 acres of the 30.3813-acre Krisumi City master project, with a total FAR of 90,684.63 sqm. Registration details are publicly verifiable at haryanarera.gov.in (HARERA project ID 2817).

faqs.question: What is the possession date?
faqs.answer: Per the HARERA registration certificate (RC/REP/HARERA/GGM/812/544/2024/39 dated 08.04.2024), the project completion date as declared by the promoter is 14 October 2029, subject to extension by HARERA in accordance with the Act and rules.

faqs.question: What amenities are available?
faqs.answer: Krisumi.com lists thirteen amenities for Waterside Residences: round the clock security, twenty four hours electricity and water, 100 percent power back-up, piped gas system, open and covered parking spaces, all air-conditioned lobbies, high speed elevators with service lift, swimming pools, convenience store, landscape and green areas, water features, seating areas, and a residents lounge with gym and business centre.

faqs.question: How can I view Waterside Residences or book a unit?
faqs.answer: For a private viewing, current pricing, payment plans and unit availability, please contact Cornerhouse Realty via the enquiry form on this page, or via the channels listed in the contact section. The Krisumi Sales Lounge is at Sector 36A, Village Sihi, Gurugram, Haryana 121004.

videoMp4s.description: Take a virtual walk through Waterside Residences.

disclaimerAddendum: Krisumi Waterside Residences is being developed by Krisumi Corporation Pvt. Ltd. (CIN U70200HR2012PTC064545) as part of the Krisumi City master township in Sector 36A, Village Sihi, Gurugram, Haryana 121004. The project is registered with the Haryana Real Estate Regulatory Authority, Gurugram, under registration number RC/REP/HARERA/GGM/812/544/2024/39 dated 8 April 2024 (HARERA project ID 2817, unique project ID RERA-GRG-PROJ-1562-2024). The registered phase covers 5.0951 acres of the 30.3813-acre Krisumi City master project, with a total FAR of 90,684.63 sqm and 612 residential apartments, 108 EWS units and 1 shop across Towers 3.1, 3.2 and 3.3. Project completion date as declared by the promoter is 14 October 2029, subject to extension by HARERA in accordance with the Act and rules. Per RERA, sales are on a carpet area basis only. Prospective purchasers should verify all approved details on the HARERA website at haryanarera.gov.in before booking. Renders, layouts and amenity references are conceptual artist impressions for representational purposes; actual designs are subject to authority approvals.
